title: StaffManagerX
description: Auto demote inactive staff and get alerts on staff activity. Manage your staff team; effectively, efficiently and quickly with just one plugin.
body:
# StaffManagerX: The Ultimate Staff Management & Activity Suite
***The definitive solution for an active and accountable staff team.***

Managing a Minecraft server's staff team can be a demanding task. How do you ensure your moderators and admins are active, engaged, and deserving of their permissions? **StaffManagerX** is the definitive solution, designed to automate the tedious parts of staff management so you can focus on what matters: your community.

---
## ✨ Core Features

### 📊 Intuitive Activity GUI
Gain instant, clear insights into your team's performance. The `/staffman activityui` command opens a clean, modern interface showing every staff member, their rank, their last login date, and total time played. No more guessing or digging through log files!

### ⚙️ Automatic Inactivity Demotion
StaffManagerX can be configured to automatically detect and demote staff members who have been inactive for a specified period.

> This crucial feature enhances server security, maintains a professional appearance, and ensures that only your active members hold powerful roles.

### ⚡ Lightweight & Performant
Built from the ground up to be efficient, StaffManagerX won't add any unnecessary strain or lag to your server. It does its job quietly and effectively in the background.

### 👤 Reviews done by you in a more efficient format
We'll never disrupt staff while at work and get in their way but we will log their actions and make them readily reviewable you can even set it up to log in discord!

---
## 🤔 Why Choose StaffManagerX?
*   **Save Time:** Automate the chore of monitoring and managing staff activity.
*   **Enhance Security:** Automatically remove permissions from inactive staff, which could potentially eventually be or what already are compromised accounts.
*   **Increase Professionalism:** Your staff list will always reflect your *active* and dedicated team.
*   **Make Data-Driven Decisions:** Use real activity data to inform promotions and team restructuring.

---
## 💻 Commands & Permissions
| Command | Permission | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/staffman activityui` | `staffman.activityui` | Opens the main Staff Activity GUI. |
| `/staffman reload` | `staffman.reload` | Reloads the plugin's configuration. |
---

# IN ORDER FOR IT TO TRACK A STAFF MEMBER:
- They must have the permission `staffmanager.managed`
- OPs will not be demoted but activity will be tracked

# Review our plugin's usage
https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/StaffManagerX/26390
